---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement to the standalone fork
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Motivation**
<!-- What problem are you trying to solve? Who is this for? -->

**Proposed behavior**
<!-- What would the change look like, concretely? -->

**Alternatives considered**
<!-- Other approaches you weighed and why they're worse. -->

**Would you be willing to PR this?**
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] Maybe, with guidance
- [ ] No

**Note:** features that belong in JBrowse itself (new view types, track adapters, core rendering) should be requested upstream at [GMOD/jbrowse-components](https://github.com/GMOD/jbrowse-components/issues). This repo's scope is the standalone-npm packaging and customization surface.
